message:
fix(database,channel,transport): continue checkpoint migration in mysql, postgres, broadcast, and stream

Replace remaining is_cancel_requested() calls with checkpoint().is_err()
in the MySQL and Postgres connection IO loops (write, read, flush),
the broadcast channel reserve path, and the transport stream next-with-
cancel future.

This is the same cancel-check migration applied to gen_server and
messaging in prior commits, now extended to the database and transport
layers to ensure cooperative cancellation is consistent across all IO
paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
